programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Anaconda is an action-packed thriller starring JENNIFER LOPEZ (The Wedding Planner), rap superstar ICE CUBE (XXX: State of the Union), Academy Award®-winner JON VOIGHT (1978 Best Actor, Coming Home) and ERIC STOLTZ (Almost Famous). A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale (Stoltz) and director Terri Flores (Lopez), ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilization. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide (Voight), who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster. Ger ready for a wild, scare-a-minute thrill ride because ANACONDA will grab you and take your breath away.

programme.title: The Motherhood
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. With support from The Motherhood, Tasha rediscovers her confidence as a woman.

programme.title: The Mystery Cruise
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Alvirah and Regan witness a real murder attempt on a murder mystery cruise.

programme.title: Torn From Her Arms
programme.desc: A mother and daughter who fled violence in El Salvador must find their way back to each other after being separated at the U.S. border and detained in detention centers in different states.

programme.title: Have You Seen My Son?
programme.desc: Released from prison, a woman tries to find out where her child vanished to while she was away. When her journey leads her down a winding path that puts her life in danger, she realizes that learning the truth might come at the cost of her freedom.

programme.title: You Killed My Mother
programme.desc: After being told her mother doesn't qualify for a liver transplant, a disturbed teen attacks and injures a hospital nurse. When she's released from a mental hospital years later, she seeks revenge on those she blames for her mother's death.

programme.title: Torn From Her Arms
programme.desc: A mother and daughter who fled violence in El Salvador must find their way back to each other after being separated at the U.S. border and detained in detention centers in different states.

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: CIA operative James Silva leads a small but lethal paramilitary team on an urgent and dangerous mission. They must transport a foreign intelligence asset from an American embassy in Southeast Asia to an airfield for extraction -- a distance of 22 miles. Silva and the soldiers soon find themselves in a race against time as the city's military, police and street gangs close in to reclaim the asset.

programme.title: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: American submarine Capt. Joe Glass is on the hunt for a U.S. sub in distress in the Arctic Ocean. He soon learns that a secret Russian coup is in the offing, a conspiracy that threatens to dismantle the world order. With crew and country on the line, Glass must assemble an elite group of Navy SEALs to rescue the kidnapped Russian president and sneak through enemy waters to prevent World War III.

programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Involuntarily discharged from the Army, a special forces sergeant lands a contract with a private underground military force. When his very first assignment goes awry, the elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Semper Fi
programme.desc: Cal is a dedicated cop who also serves as a sergeant in the Marine Corps Reserve. When his reckless half brother lands in jail for accidentally killing a man, Cal and his buddies hatch a plan to break him out of prison -- no matter what the cost.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) and his new girlfriend, Carly (Rosie Huntington-Whiteley), join the fray when the evil Decepticons renew their longstanding war against the Autobots. Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) believes that resurrecting ancient Transformer Sentinel Prime (Leonard Nimoy), once the leader of the Autobots, may lead to victory. That decision, however, has devastating consequences the war appears to tip in favor of the Decepticons, leading to a climactic battle in Chicago.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After an epic battle, a great city lies in ruins, but the Earth itself is saved. As humanity begins to pick up the pieces, a shadowy group emerges to try to take control of history. Meanwhile, an ancient and powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth. A new group of humans, led by Cade Yeager (Mark Wahlberg), helps Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) and the Autobots rise up to meet their most fearsome challenge yet: a worldwide war of good versus evil.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: Gordon Jennings (Idris Elba) and his friends enjoy a luxurious lifestyle funded by bank robberies, and they avoid capture by sticking to a strict set of rules. As they celebrate the latest job, a former associate arrives with a daring plan to rob an armored car. The lure of so much cash is too tempting to resist but, unbeknown to Gordon's men, this heist puts them on a collision course with Russian mobsters and a detective (Matt Dillon) who will do anything to capture them.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: An uptight cop (Samuel L. Jackson), the self-appointed watchdog of his neighborhood, strongly disapproves of the interracial newlyweds (Patrick Wilson, Kerry Washington) who just moved in next door. He becomes increasingly hostile toward the innocent pair, going to great lengths to force them out of their home. The situation changes when the young couple decide to fight back.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: Feeling responsible for his father's death, which occurred during a climbing expedition, Peter Garrett (Chris O'Donnell) has quit the pursuit in favor of photography, while his sister, Annie (Robin Tunney), has become a top climber. After Annie is hired by wealthy businessman Elliot Vaughn (Bill Paxton) to lead a trek, inclement weather causes the crew to become trapped. Facing his fears, Peter assembles a rescue team, including experienced climber Montgomery Wick (Scott Glenn), to save them.

programme.title: To Sir, With Love
programme.desc: American Mark Thackeray (Sidney Poitier) recently received his degree in engineering, but cannot find work. To make ends meet, he takes a job as a teacher in a rough London East End school populated mostly with troublemakers who were rejected from other schools for their behavior. While the students at first see Thackeray as just another teacher open for ridicule and bullying, his calm demeanor and desire to see them succeed gradually earn him their respect.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: When Joanna Drayton (Katharine Houghton), a free-thinking white woman, and black doctor John Prentice (Sidney Poitier) become engaged, they travel to San Francisco to meet her parents. Matt Drayton (Spencer Tracy) and his wife Christina (Katharine Hepburn) are wealthy liberals who must confront the latent racism the coming marriage arouses. Also attending the Draytons' dinner are Prentice's parents (Roy E. Glenn Sr., Beah Richards), who vehemently disapprove of the relationship.

programme.title: From Here to Eternity
programme.desc: At an Army barracks in Hawaii in the days preceding the attack on Pearl Harbor, lone-wolf soldier and boxing champion Prew Prewitt (Montgomery Clift) refuses to box, preferring to play the bugle instead. Hard-hearted Capt. Holmes (Philip Ober) subjects Prew to a grueling series of punishments while, unknown to Holmes, the gruff but fair Sgt. Warden (Burt Lancaster) engages in a clandestine affair with the captain's mistreated wife (Deborah Kerr).

programme.title: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Broke and without work, newspaper reporter Eddie Willis (Humphrey Bogart) agrees to work for the corrupt boxing promoter Nick Benko (Rod Steiger) to help hype his new boxer, Toro Moreno (Mike Lane). While Toro is beastly in appearance, he has no actual boxing talent, and all his fights are fixed. When Toro gets a shot at the title against the brutal Buddy Brannen (Max Baer), Willis is faced with the tough decision of whether or not to tell Toro that his entire career is a sham.

programme.title: Same Kind of Different as Me
programme.desc: From The NY Times bestseller comes an inspirational true story about two men from drastically different backgrounds, who develop a surprising bond that will lead them on the most remarkable journey of their lives and forge an everlasting friendship.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Down-on-their luck brothers Lars and Ernie Smuntz don't think much of the crumbling old mansion they inherit, until they discover that their dilapidated estate is actually worth millions.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of "France," by way of far-off, far-out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: As ‘The Chosen One', Murphy's on a madcap mission to save The Golden Child, a youth with mystical powers who's been abducted by an evil cult.

programme.title: The Constant Gardener
programme.desc: Assigned to a new post, reserved British diplomat Justin Quayle (Ralph Fiennes) relocates to Kenya with his lovely young wife, Tessa (Rachel Weisz), an activist for social justice. When Tessa is found murdered out in the wilderness, circumstances point to her friend, Dr. Arnold Bluhm (Hubert Koundé), but it is soon clear that he's not the killer. Grief-stricken and angry, Justin sets out to uncover the truth behind Tessa's murder -- and in the process, he unearths some disturbing revelations.

programme.title: Hollywoodland
programme.desc: A detective (Adrien Brody) uncovers unexpected links to his own personal life as he probes the mysterious death of "Superman" actor George Reeves (Ben Affleck) in 1959. A possible affair between the actor and Toni Mannix (Diane Lane), the wife of a studio executive (Bob Hoskins), might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: "Mercury Rising" stars Bruce Willis as Art Jeffries, a renegade FBI agent who combats ruthless federal agents to protect Simon (Miko Hughes), a 9-year-old autistic boy who has cracked the government's new unbreakable code. He can read MERCURY, the most advanced encryption code yet created, as easily as other kids read English. This ability renders the new billion-dollar secret code vulnerable, especially if enemies of the United States should learn of Simon's abilities and capture him.

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: In 1970s rural Mississippi, Vietnam veteran Stephen Simmons (Kevin Costner) adjusts to life after military service. Plagued by nightmares about his wartime experiences, Stephen finds some measure of peace in his new mining job and his relationship with his wife, Lois (Mare Winningham). As Stephen works through his battle trauma, his children -- son Stu (Elijah Wood) and daughter Lidia (Lexi Randall) -- wage a war against a group of neighborhood kids over the ownership of a tree house.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus� only daughter wants to experience the �real world� before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: The Christmas Kid
programme.desc: A take on Home Alone British style where the main character is all grown up now.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
programme.desc: Locals and the media stand up to authorities when they shut down a girl's lemonade stand.

programme.title: Signs of Your Heart
programme.desc: Allie's new tenant might be the answer to all her problems as he bonds with her deaf son Finn.

programme.title: Driven Underground
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah hides her family in Oregon when her daughter is a witness in a murder against the mob.

programme.title: Double Patty
programme.desc: Woo-ram, a struggling athlete and big foodie, finds himself in a burger restaurant one fateful evening, unaware that a simple double patty hamburger would change his life. He Instantly clicks with Hyun-ji, an aspiring news anchor who works hard at the restaurant to make ends meet. As their relationship grows, so do their confidence, strength, and determination to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: The Plan Man
programme.desc: A meticulous librarian's love plan is shaken by a free-spirited musician, pushing him to face the world.

programme.title: The Policeman's Lineage
programme.desc: Major Crimes captain Kang-yoon receives special funding for investigations. One day, a rookie joins his unit.

programme.title: The Concubine
programme.desc: Hwa-yeon, a concubine, faces palace danger after the king's death. A bloody fate awaits all within the palace.

programme.title: 10 Reasons Why Men Cheat
programme.desc: In the wake of a wedding catastrophe, three couples discover the meaning of commitment while discussing what women want to know most of all when it comes to men and relationships.

programme.title: Kinfolk
programme.desc: Eboni is a hair stylist dreaming of owning a successful salon in her hometown, with the support of her half-siblings Beau and Hillary. Things get complicated when their father attempts to reconcile for the past.

programme.title: Against All Odds
programme.desc: David, a young man reeling from his brother's death and his family's financial ruin, finds himself adrift. Rejected by his father, he turns to a local criminal for quick cash, only to find himself trapped in a dangerous web of deceit and violence. Now, David must fight to escape and protect his family before it's too late. The clock is ticking, and the stakes are higher than ever.

programme.title: Father Knows Best
programme.desc: Raised by a controlling criminal father, Zoe grapples with the trauma of her mother's death. Forced into a life of crime, she yearns for a spiritual connection. Zoe fights for freedom while battling the fear of losing his approval.

programme.title: Vegas Vixens
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, an escort's murder ignites a fierce pursuit of justice. An undercover agent and a detective work to bring her killer to justice. Facing danger and corruption within the system, they fight to dismantle a criminal empire.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Mary are concerned that other students won't accept them on their first day of school Nellie Oleson snubs them for their homespun dresses.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After a hailstorm devastates his crops, Charles learns of blasting work available in a faraway quarry.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Charles brings an old friend home to dinner, Caroline decides the man would be a perfect match for Widow Snider.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura becomes enamoured by a new student, but he expresses more interest in Mary, which breaks her heart.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: If I Should Wake Before I Die
programme.desc: Charles helps a woman stage her own wake to ensure her distant children's attendance.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura befriends a lonely, crippled girl (Kim Richards) sheltered by her father.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Caroline reluctantly leaves the children with a baby sitter when Charles invites her on a 6-day trip to Mankato.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Substitute-teacher Caroline deals with a boy (Dirk Blocker) ridiculed for his limited literacy.

programme.title: Last of the Comanches
programme.desc: A cavalry sergeant (Broderick Crawford) leads soldiers, civilians and an Indian (Johnny Stewart) on a desert trek.

programme.title: Up the MacGregors
programme.desc: Gregor MacGregor (David Bailey) is celebrating his upcoming marriage to Rosita Carson (Agata Flori) when bandits, led by the evil Maldonado (Leo Anchóriz), steal the family fortune. Determined to get their money back, Gregor and his six brothers go after the robbers. They run across a dentist and his beautiful daughter, who help them find the gang's hideout and retrieve their cash -- but then Maldonado takes Rosita hostage in retaliation. When Gregor comes to save her, he is also captured.

programme.title: Land Raiders
programme.desc: An Arizona land-grabber (Telly Savalas) and his brother (George Maharis) renew their feud amid Army troops and Apaches.

programme.title: Ride Beyond Vengeance
programme.desc: Following an 11-year stay as a buffalo hunter in Kansas, Jonas Trapp (Chuck Connors) is finally on the way home to his wife, Jessie (Kathryn Hays), with the $17,000 he has saved up. Unfortunately, he happens to run into a group of bandits led by Brooks Durham (Michael Rennie) they beat him, brand him and steal all of his money. Now, returning home without a dollar to his name, Jonas finds Jessie has moved on to another man -- namely, Brooks Durham.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: In Old California
programme.desc: The Duke plays a young, ambitious pharmacist who moves into a brawling frontier town but locks horns with a local crime lord, bent on keeping the town for himself.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: And the Crows Will Dig Your Grave
programme.desc: Wells Fargo hires bounty hunters to protect its gold transports from notorious outlaw Glenn Kovacs. Hired gunman Jeff Sullivan buys the freedom of Dan Barker, a prisoner who may lead him to Kovacs, but Barker escapes.

programme.title: Day of Anger
programme.desc: A poor street cleaner is relentlessly bullied by the people of a small western township, but things change when a ruthless gunfighter rides into the town.

programme.title: A Town Called Hell
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century in Mexico, an outlaw (Robert Shaw) leads a massacre of a small town. Soldiers and townspeople alike are killed, and, when a priest and his followers take refuge in a church, they too are ruthlessly offed. A decade later, the town is run by Don Carlos (Telly Savalas), and the murderous outlaw has changed his name and is now a local priest. When Alvira (Stella Stevens) trots into the town, she offers a large reward to whoever kills the savage outlaw.

programme.title: Seven Guns for the MacGregors
programme.desc: Two Scots (Robert Woods, Paul Carter) and their five brothers fight bandits and a crooked sheriff on the Mexican border.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brothers mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man.

programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A con man makes his living by provoking and then betting on gunfights.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: In the Wild West, the Rawhide way station becomes the center of a hostage situation when four murderous fugitives (Hugh Marlowe, Dean Jagger, Jack Elam, George Tobias) take it over in a heist scheme. After killing the stationmaster (Tyrone Power), the criminals keep the only other employee, Sam Todd (Edgar Buchanan), alive to avoid outside suspicion by maintaining a front of normalcy. But Todd and the other hostages, Vinnie Holt (Susan Hayward) and her young niece, plot to make an escape.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: The avenging head of the McCandle clan returns to his estranged family and leads the search for his kidnapped grandson. Big Jake sets off, his sons in tow, to deliver the ransom to the kidnappers, but has little intention of handing it over without a fight.

programme.title: The Siege at Red River
programme.desc: Rebel raiders transport a stolen Gatling gun in a medicine-show wagon Indians get it.

programme.title: Rio Conchos
programme.desc: When a shipment of repeating rifles is stolen from the U.S. Cavalry, Capt. Haven (Stuart Whitman) and Sgt. Franklyn are sent to recover them and enlist the aid of an alcoholic former confederate and Indian hater, James Lassiter (Richard Boone) and a Mexican murderer, Rodriguez (Tony Franciosa). Lassiter, who owns one of the rifles, says it came from his embittered former commander Col. Pardee, while an Apache woman informant reveals that Pardee intends to sell the stolen arms to her people.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A San Francisco merchant works to corner the market on rice when he hears that China's about to ban the export of the staple.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A woman is not pleased by the attentions of a drunk, but she's even less happy when Faro Bill kills the man.

programme.desc: U.S. settlers arrive in Mexican-controlled California and clash with the resident Hispanic families.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: New sheriff Pat Garrett embarks on a mission to capture the infamous outlaw Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The daughter of a California ranch owner discovers a lost fortune after his death.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A lady wishes to court a shy but highly skilled logroller.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When Alex Todd discovers there's money to be made delivering the mail, he starts a subscription mail service and takes letters to the gold camps for miners starving for news from home.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Author Bret Harte arrives in the West, where the colorful residents inspire his story, "The Outcasts of Poker Flat."

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A man must transport 500 mail-order brides from Boston to the state of Washington.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: In 1846, American forces move northward, leaving sparsely manned Los Angeles an inviting target to the Mexicans.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A bandit uses a look-alike to create an alibi for his crime.

programme.title: Death Valley Days

programme.title: Return to Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: After fulfilling Gus' last request to be buried in Texas, Woodrow Call (Jon Voight) heads back to Montana with a herd of mustangs for Hat Creek Cattle Co.

programme.desc: Recognizing that Maj. Robert Parrish (Dale Robertson) has a history of making peace with Native American tribes, President Ulysses S. Though negotiations seem to be going well, Parrish can't stop the deadly Battle of Little Big Horn. Many die, but when he helps Sitting Bull survive, Parrish is charged with crimes against the government, and he will be executed unless Grant steps in.

Released after 20 years, Lee wastes no time picking up where he left off -- which pushes Hayes to come out of retirement to catch his man again. But Hayes is not the only one after Lee when a young bandit (Shaun Cassidy) targets the old crook.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: The second-largest Greek island and an hour from Athens, Diane heads out in search of mushrooms with a local mushroom forager and cultivator. They cook a favorite local recipe "kritharoto," mushrooms with orzo. Diane makes three delectable dishes with mushrooms, wine and local ingrediants, inspired by the flavors of this nearby "secret" land.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the rich, cuisine of Corfu, a mixture of Greek, Italian, French and others. A local cook makes a Venetian soffrito, and orange salad. In the market: Corfu's famous kumquats, ouzo-infused figs, local fish. Diane cooks up mixed braised greens with feta, an Italian fish stew called bourtheto and Venetian pastitsio, reworked for the modern cook.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: To embrace the cosmopolitan aura of this island, Diane visits Alkis Downward, who created a sustainable agriculture project on one of Greece's most touristed Aegean islands. Discover the food of Paros and its local recipes: rabbit, skate salad and air-dried mackerel. Diane prepares a Greek island meal that will make you want to sail straight to the Aegean.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Chios, a local ritual: the making of Chian firewater, Souma, distilled from fermented figs. In this foray through Chios's traditions, Diane discovers delicious desserts, all part of the table for this feast. Chios is for food lovers, and Diane returns to her kitchen for some great island-inspired dishes. Eggplant pilaf and an aromatic meat-filled omelet are on the menu.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits Lefkada, where she discovers Greece's tastiest, tenderest lentils, rosewater vinegar, and the art of local embroidery. A local cook imparts the secrets of the local lemony cod stew. Diane succumbs to the siren's call of flavors and history known as the Ionian Islands and prepares a bevy of dishes from several of these lush, delicious lands off Greece's western coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane introduces us to some of the islands' customs, landscapes and culinary delights: wine-soaked cheeses, grape leaves stuffed with everything, pasta with caramelized onions and a tart fermented cheese, sparkling wines, cumin-scented rusks and tiny, crunchy shrimp. These delectable recipes will have us all wanting to cook with the flavors of Dodecanese for dinner.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane discovers the history of her historic neighborhood in the heart of central Athens with the city's most renowned urban chronicler, and cooks up a delicious Spiced Roasted Chicken with Toasted Orzo Pilaf, Kale Caesar with Greek yogurt and a Crispy Phyllo Ice Cream Sundae with Honey, Nuts and Halva.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the fast-growing vegan trends in Athens, honing in on the transformation of Greek classics like moussaka rendered vegan! She invites the country's best-known vegan chef into her kitchen. The results are delightful: Vegan Moussaka, Vegan Galaktoboureko, even a Vegan Yiouvarlakia, a Rice-Meatball Soup. Hint: mushrooms and avocados are involved.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and chef Carolina Doriti explore the street food scene in Athens, tasting their way through vegan treats, savory hand-held pies, overflowing sandwiches and hand-made gelato. Inspired, Diane creates some homemade street food: a Gyro-Stuffed Baked Bread Loaf, a Warm Green Bean Salad with Chopped Onion and Hazelnuts, and a Healthy Smoothie Bowl with Greek Yogurt.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: No other city evokes the rich and complex history of Greek cuisine better than Thessaloniki, Greece's de facto culinary capital. Diane learns the secrets of bougatsa, an airy, creamy phyllo pastry, and boards a mussel boat just off the coast. In her kitchen she cooks up Feta-Stuffed Sweet Red Peppers and Mussel Pilaf.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits the home of 90-year-old Irini Pournara and her daughter Margarita, a journalist for the city's most respected daily paper. Eirini makes Athinaiki Mayioneza (poached fish and vegetables with homemade mayonnaise), and Diane cooks up A la Polita, a sophisticated artichoke dish, and a Meatloaf Wrapped in Grape Leaves.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Ioannina is a crossroads of the meat-and-cheese-centric cooking of the Pindus mountains as well as the culinary gifts of a lake in the northwestern corner of Greece. Diane focuses on this quaint old city's culinary and cultural lore: from a unique local version of baklava to hearty Clay-Baked Lamb to a Feta-Cheese Skillet Pie to a rare Clay-Tile-Baked Eel.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen: Braised Pigeon with Homemade Herb Gnocchi
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern cooks braised squab with olives and vinegar, a perfect meal for a fall evening.

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: After his beloved father (Brian Dennehy) dies, dimwitted Tommy Callahan (Chris Farley) inherits a near-bankrupt automobile parts factory in Sandusky, Ohio. His brand new stepmother, Beverly (Bo Derek), wants to cash out and close, but Tommy's sentimental attachment to his father's employees spurs him to make one last-ditch effort to find someone who will buy their products. With his father's tightly wound assistant, Richard (David Spade), in tow, Tommy hits the road to scare up some new clients.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: Overly enthusiastic guitarist Dewey Finn (Jack Black) gets thrown out of his bar band and finds himself in desperate need of work. Posing as a substitute music teacher at an elite private elementary school, he exposes his students to the hard rock gods he idolizes and emulates -- much to the consternation of the uptight principal (Joan Cusack). As he gets his privileged and precocious charges in touch with their inner rock 'n' roll animals, he imagines redemption at a local Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: Black Sheep
programme.desc: Mike (Chris Farley), a slovenly gym teacher, has a terrible habit of showing up at the wrong time and embarrassing his brother, Al (Tim Matheson), who happens to be running for governor. Hoping to save his campaign, Al assigns his aide, Steve (David Spade), to take Mike to a remote cabin and hide out there for the remainder of the campaign. In the woods, the two men discover dangers that make them long for the sleazy political operatives back in the big city.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: Cone-headed extraterrestrials Beldar (Dan Aykroyd) and Prymaat (Jane Curtin) find themselves in New Jersey after a recon mission for their home planet of Remulak goes awry. Stranded, they are forced to live as typical suburban humans. Beldar gets a job, and daughter Connie (Michelle Burke) grows up to be a typical, if oddly shaped, teenager. When INS agents start investigating the family and Beldar receives sinister orders from Remulak, the Coneheads must decide where their allegiance lies.

programme.title: Ross Bennett
programme.sub-title: Comedy! ... for the rest of us
programme.desc: A popular headliner at comedy clubs worldwide, veteran comedian (and btw, he's also a veteran!), Ross Bennett has appeared on The Late Show with David Letterman, and, along with countless other TV appearances.

programme.title: Paul Sheffield
programme.desc: Paul has been doing comedy since 2008 and has been headlining in Utah, Idaho, and Wyoming. He has a CD on iTunes Sheffield Had it Worse" Winner of 2010 Happy Valley Comedy Competition.

programme.title: Greg Morton
programme.sub-title: I Started Out, as a Baby
programme.desc: Greg Morton had only two choices in schoolyard conflicts. Learn the ways of the force, or use his wit to diffuse situations. That wit would soon lead to winning first prize in the, ‘So You Think You're Funny Contest' and the beginning of his stand-up comedy career. He was no longer the shy introverted kid, drawing cartoons in the corner. He had finally found his voice. A voice he would later use to direct and voice over twenty Saturday Morning cartoons. This former mobile disc jockey, who used to play songs at weddings, now sings song parodies on nationally syndicated radio shows, like the Bob and Tom Show. Take his Obama Man, sung to the tune of Candy Man, which has racked up over 4 million hits on YouTube.

programme.title: Dwayne Perkins: Dwayne Explains
programme.desc: Dwayne returns to Dry Bar Comedy. If you loved his first special, you will certainly love his 2nd! Dwayne Perkins has earned a spot in today's elite class of stand-up comics with appearances on Comedy Central and on Conan.

programme.title: Mike Guido
programme.desc: Mike Guido has made his mark as a nationally known headlining comedian. He has made eight national TV appearances including SHOWTIME, A&E, MTV, and VH1 and has worked with some of today's biggest stars such as Jay Leno, Robin Williams, and Ellen Degenneres.

programme.title: Kjell Bjorgen
programme.sub-title: I'm Sorry But I Won't Apologize
programme.desc: Kjell began his comedy career in Los Angeles, California. He gained some notoriety when featured in both the Chicago comedy festival and Montreal comedy festival. He decided to hone his craft and perform on the road. His hard work paid off when asked to be the opener on the Lewis Black Nothing's Sacred tour. You may have seen him on NBC's Late Friday and Comedy Central's Live at Gotham.

programme.title: Tom Ryan
programme.desc: Over the years Tom Ryan has worked steadily at comedy clubs, concert venues, corporate functions and colleges across the U.S.. He has also made national television appearances on Showtime, A&E Comedy Central, and… Three times on “The Late Show with David Letterman!”. He has performed as the opening act in concert for: B.B. King, Tim Allen, Steven Wright, Natalie Cole, and Dennis Miller just to name a few. He has contributed monologue jokes to the award winning "Politically Incorrect with Bill Maher" and regularly headlines corporate events for companies ranging from Coca-Cola to Church and Dwight. Tom believes that the best comedy comes from the most unlikely sources.

programme.title: Don Friesen
programme.desc: Husband. Idiot. Dad. His kids think he's fun. His wife thinks he's an idiot. Audiences think he's hilarious! Don is a modern suburban dad just trying to raise his kids and get through the day with a bit of money in the bank and a scrap of dignity intact. With a unique style that can best be described as frenetic and engaging, Don captures the irony of parenting, marriage and everyday absurdities through characters, voices, parodies and some of the best written routines around. He's a wanna-be geek who constantly upgrades to the latest technology, but can never get it to work, leading to signature bits about tech support, Idiots Guides, texting and passwords. Friesen has recently taken his smart, savvy, and highly-caffeinated comedy to the stage at the Alex Theatre in Glendale, CA, for the taping of his new Showtime one-hour special titled "Ask Your Mom." In his first nationally released concert special, Don delivers a winning hour of clever, true-to-life "he's talking about my family up there" comedy that manages to be adult-smart yet family-friendly.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: Hardly any other area is as unspoiled as the Yukon Delta in western Alaska. This fascinating network of swamps and river arms looks like a landscape at the beginning of mankind. Only 25,000 people live in this barren region, which is almost as big as Greece. Most of these inhabitants are indigenous and belong to the ethnic group of the Yupik. They make their living on the steep banks of the Yukon River. And in their villages, built on piles to protect them against flooding, you can see the effects of climate changes on nature - and on the community life of the indigenous population. On the trail of the national fish of Alaska, the salmon, the film follows the Yukon River and follows moose hunters, migratory birds and scientists who do research in the delta.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
programme.desc: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention. From terrifying twisters to radical rain, we've got it all....and over the next half hour, you'll see 25 of the most insane weather ever caught on camera. Get comfortable, because you're about to experience Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head
programme.desc: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow
programme.desc: Today's forecast is quite the doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure. No, it's not the end of the world...it's just another day here on Extreme Weather Countdown! j

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Right As Rainstorms
programme.desc: Wind is whipping, thunder is clapping, and rain is pouring, but you're not out in the elements- you're watching another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun and his frolicsome Flock return, along with the Farmer and the long-suffering sheepdog Bitzer, for plenty more hilarious farmyard antics in Season 2. Episodes 37-39.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Shaun and his frolicsome Flock return, along with the Farmer and the long-suffering sheepdog Bitzer, for plenty more hilarious farmyard antics in Season 2. Episodes 38-40.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: The Rainbow Wave // The Best Pet You Never Met
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Hat Trick // Dancing on the Ice
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: When the Moon was Missing // Trouble in a Bubble
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day // The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev offers to help look after a rambunctious puppy, Rumble gets jealous of all the attention he gets. And much to his annoyance, while Rev and Avery try everything to teach the pup new tricks (with no success), it only has eyes for Rumble! // When Rev tries to teach Rumble to swim with his special inflated tires, Rumble keeps sinking to the bottom of the pond. Ben and Molly suggest they get advice from Gilly, the old Fender Bend ferry pilot.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev and Avery find a stray kitten, they put posters around to alert its owner. The owner arrives at the Gear Up Garage...just as the kitty vanishes! Rev and the gang set out to find the kitten, and Operation Kitten Care becomes Operation Rescue! // When Rev leads the gang in a fossil hunting expedition, they find an enormous skull! But when Molly breaks the news that they'll have to leave the skeleton for professionals to dig up, Rev wonders how he can still have a dinosaur of his own.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day // The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Kongsuni and Friends
programme.desc: For five-year-old Kongsuni life is one big adventure. Whether it's at home, in school, or on the playground.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met
programme.desc: Everyday Henry meets something new - The day Henry met a Whale! The day Henry met the Moon!, The day Henry met a Car! How exciting, I wonder what Henry's going to meet today?

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: All aboard the learning express! Ted is a train who teaches children about colours, animals, fruits, vegetables and more.

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: The Construction Squad builds Car City brick by brick! They're proof that everything's possible with a little help from our friends.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: A whimsical journey through time with timeless nursery rhymes that dance and sing, bringing joy to little hearts

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing is a collection of soothing artworks like Shooting Star, Owl, and much more.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing is a creative journey combining art like Glitter Fish, Mermaid, and relaxation.

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: This wonderful collection of classic rhymes has Miss Polly Had A Dolly, Baa Baa Black Sheep & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Tap your feet to Pin Pon, 5 Little Buses and Mary had a little lamb in this fun musical episode!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Get grooving with a medley of fun kids songs like Dinosaur Song, Fruits Song, and Colors Song

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie and Ben - Episode 7
programme.desc: Annie, Ben and Mango find themselves on Japan's Rabbit Island, where the king of bunnies challenges Ben to a race. We've all heard the story of the hare and the tortoise! Will Ben be the slow and steady one? Or will he snooze and lose?

programme.title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben
programme.sub-title: The Adventures of Annie & Ben - Episode 1
programme.desc: There's a Dragon's pearl hunt on Great Wall with Annie, Ben & Mango! Get ready for a fun adventure!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Here is a collection of back to back classic rhymes like Simple Simon,Twinkle Twinkle Little Star.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: From I hear thunder to Farmer in the Dell presenting lullabies that will help kids sleep well.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Sweet lullabies that gently ease children into a restful night's sleep.

programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Camp Cool Kids

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Sox: A Family's Best Friend

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making a giant Tricky Sticky Rice Dumpling and need six handfuls of tricky stick rice. Gathering the rice should be no problem, however, when the sticky rice comes alive, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble find themselves in a sticky situation! Can they get the rice they need to the kitchen to the Cooking Countdown, or will the tricky stick rice plants chase them out of town? / The Bumble Nums are making a Chilly Cherry Cheesecake and need nine chilly cherries of different sizes! Once the cherries chill to the proper temperature, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble get to picking! The recipe calls for three small cherries, three medium cherries, and three big cherries. Can they gather the right sizes and get the ingredients to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? / The Bumble Nums are making Boogie Down Baba Ganoush and need four boogieing eggplants! So, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble break out their best dance moves to get the eggplants moving and help catch them! But, how can they get the ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? Maybe a boogie down conga line will work?

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making delicious Boomerang Banana Splits and need three boomeranging bananas! Humble, Grumble, and Stumble believe catching boomeranging bananas is so easy! But, is it? Can the Bumble Nums bag the three bananas they need in time for the Cooking Countdown? / Mmm. Today, the Bumble Nums are making Mouthwatering Mac and Cheese! They need to wrangle six speedy cheese wheels from the barn. After a wild ride corralling the speedy cheese wheels, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble must race the secret ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown. Will they make it in time to make their mouthwatering meal?

programme.title: Mittens & Pants

Mittens helps Post Pig Petunia deliver a special birthday cupcake the Mayor baked for Nanna Ribbit. But will they get it to her on time? Pants and Popcorn have fun digging the best hole ever, but when they forget to fill it in, Post Pig Petunia falls in and scatters her mail everywhere.
